# Octoshell Japan — Private Chauffeur & Luxury Transfer Service

> Octoshell Japan (貝八方株式会社) is a licensed private chauffeur company based in Tokyo, Japan. We provide premium door-to-door transfer and hourly hire services across Japan for international travelers, business executives, and luxury leisure guests.

## Company

- Legal name: 貝八方株式会社 (Kaibappou Co., Ltd.)
- Brand name: Octoshell Japan
- Founded: Tokyo, Japan
- License: KAN-JI-RYO-NI No. 1248 (Kanto Transport Bureau)
- Website: https://octoshell.jp
- Booking: https://octoshell.jp/book
- Email: info@octoshell.jp
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/octoshell_japan/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/octoshell

## Services & Fixed Prices (Toyota Alphard · includes highway & parking)

- Haneda Airport (HND) ↔ Tokyo: ¥20,000
- Narita Airport (NRT) ↔ Tokyo: ¥25,000
- Tokyo City (10-hour hire): ¥43,000
- Tokyo → Hakone / Outlets: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Fuji Mt. / Outlets: ¥68,000
- Tokyo → Kanagawa: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Izu / East Izu: ¥70,000
- Tokyo → Golf Clubs: ¥50,000
- Toyota Hiace (larger group): prices approx. 10–15% higher

## What Makes Octoshell Different

- Fully licensed under Japanese law (green-plate compliance)
- English-speaking chauffeurs available
- Meet & greet service at airport arrivals hall
- 1 hour free waiting time for flight delays
- Real-time flight tracking
- Nationwide coverage across all of Japan
- Vehicles: Toyota Alphard (up to 6 pax), Toyota Hiace (up to 9 pax)
- All tolls, highway fees, and parking included in quoted price
- No surge pricing — fixed flat rates

## Cancellation Policy

- More than 24 hours before pickup: no charge
- Within 24 hours: 50% of fare
- Same day / no-show: 100% of fare

## Payment

- Credit card, bank transfer, and cash accepted
- Invoicing available for corporate clients

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://octoshell.jp)
- [All Services](https://octoshell.jp/services)
- [Book a Transfer](https://octoshell.jp/book)
- [About Octoshell](https://octoshell.jp/about)
- [Legal Disclosure](https://octoshell.jp/law)
- [Privacy Policy](https://octoshell.jp/privacy)
- [Sitemap](https://octoshell.jp/sitemap.xml)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you serve all airports in Japan?
A: Yes. We primarily serve Narita (NRT) and Haneda (HND), and can arrange transfers to/from any regional airport in Japan on request.

Q: Are tolls and highway fees included?
A: Yes. All quoted prices are all-inclusive — tolls, highway fees, and parking are never added on top.

Q: Can you accommodate large groups?
A: Yes. The Toyota Hiace seats up to 9 passengers with luggage. For larger groups, multiple vehicles can be arranged.

Q: Do you provide child seats?
A: Yes, child seats are available on request at no extra charge.

Q: Is English communication available?
A: Yes. Our booking team and drivers communicate in English.

Q: How far in advance should I book?
A: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance. Last-minute requests are accommodated subject to availability.
